_doc: Per-page dependency declarations for the atlas-core dashboard atlas. Round-1 stub: the four pages (conversation / action / registries / catalogue) declare only their identity. Their `requires_layers` / `requires_operations` / `requires_slots` / `preloads` lists are populated when the layer + operation registries are filled (round 2).

conversation._doc: Static design-doc page today. Will eventually require the LLM-funnel operation chain when wired.

action._doc: Reads the eight TSVs under toolkit_registries/relatedness/01_registry/. No layer or operation dependencies in round 1 because the page does its own fetch().

registries._doc: Reads the eight TSVs and renders chains + a brick-edit sidebar. Same round-1 posture as the action page.

catalogue._doc: Reads module_registry.tsv + analysis_modes.tsv. module_registry.tsv is optional — degrades gracefully when biomod isn't synced.
